title: hyptis langlassei
intro: Hyptis langlassei, also known as Mexican tea or false lavender, is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. The health benefits of Hyptis langlassei include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as colds, coughs, and skin infections, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Hyptis langlassei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
